message:
feat(perf): add input-to-display latency measurement framework (ft-1memj.25)

Implements InputLatencyStage pipeline (KeyEvent→PtyWrite→PtyRead→TermUpdate→
RenderSubmit→GpuPresent), InputLatencyMeasurement with per-stage timestamps,
InputLatencyCollector with percentile computation (p50/p95/p99/p999 via
nearest-rank method), InputLatencyBudget with regression thresholds, budget
evaluation with structured reason codes, and InputLatencyReport generation.
28 unit tests covering measurement recording, percentile computation, budget
pass/fail/threshold, serde roundtrips, collector eviction, and report
generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
